message:
fix: close TOCTOU race in FindOrCreateRigBeadsDir

FindOrCreateRigBeadsDir returned paths from os.Stat without ensuring
they persist. Now calls MkdirAll (idempotent) on found directories to
close the window between existence check and caller file operations.

Fixes gt-88z4i

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
